Legal

Shipping Policy

Orders are usually dispatched within 24-48 hours after payment confirmation, excluding Sundays and public holidays.

Estimated delivery timelines vary by location and are shown at checkout. Most metro deliveries arrive within 2-5 business days.

You will receive a tracking update by email or SMS once your order is shipped.

Delivery delays caused by weather, courier disruptions, or regional restrictions may occur and will be communicated proactively.

For shipping support, contact hello@antariyaofficial.com with your order ID.
